title: Russian Beef Dumplings
description: A hearty Russian dish featuring pan-fried beef dumplings served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: Combine ground beef, salt, black pepper, and egg in a bowl. Mix well.
Add water and mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Divide the dough into 20-25 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of sour cream and fried onions (if using).
Note: To make fried onions, heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of thinly sliced onions and cook for 5-7 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
